data.content: 1. Rejecting implementation review because the new success-rate persistence is not safe under Foolery's concurrent session model. createSession explicitly allows multiple simultaneous sessions (src/lib/terminal-manager.ts:544-551), but appendOutcomeRecord performs readFile -> push -> writeFile against the shared stats file (src/lib/agent-outcome-stats.ts:51-69). Two sessions that finish near the same time can both read the same old array and the later write will drop the earlier record, so the requested per-agent success data is incomplete and unreliable. 2. Focused verification: bun run test -- src/lib/__tests__/terminal-manager-error-retry.test.ts passed; bunx tsc --noEmit passed. Missing coverage: no test exercises concurrent appends to the stats store, which is why this regression is currently undetected.
